name: Abhishek Kushwaha
body: Recently picked up Lwang Black's newly added product along with their Brewing Pot, and it's been a great experience. Premium build, consistent brew. Highly recommended!

name: Priya Maharjan
body: The clove and coffee combination is genius. Zero stomach issues and the taste is incredible. It's become my morning ritual.

name: Roshan Thapa
body: Ordered the 500g bag and was blown away by the quality. The clove aroma is subtle, bold, and exactly what I needed.

name: Sunita Gurung
body: Gifted the Pot & Press Set to my father and he absolutely loves it. Beautiful packaging, very premium feel.

name: Mohan Shrestha
body: I've tried many coffees — Lwang Black is truly unique. The clove infusion is perfectly blended. Already on my third order.

name: Kavya Rana
body: Fast delivery, brilliant product. No crash like regular coffee. I feel focused all morning. Permanent part of my routine.
